---
title: "'Parking Downhill' & Spatial Data Fundamentals"
---

### {{< fa person-digging >}} \[Overview Under Construction\]

Check back later

:::{.callout-note icon="false" collapse="false"}

- {{< fa screwdriver-wrench >}} TBD

:::

{{< include topics/persuasive-proposal.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/spatial-map-making.qmd >}}
